name: Patty Ann's Strawberry Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugar, butter, eggs, and flavoring. Beat until light and fluffy.
3. Remove from mixer and mix in dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt) and chopped pecans by hand.
4. Grease a 9 x 13-inch pan and dust with flour.
5. Press about 2/3 of the dough into the pan.
6. Spread the jar of preserves over the dough.
7. Lattice the remaining dough in strips over the preserves using fingers or lightly floured palms.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, until set and golden brown.
9. Allow to cool in the pan until lukewarm before cutting into squares.
10. Store in a tin box between layers of wax paper. Can be frozen.
